claim: Replacing 15,000 lines of complex production code with 200 lines of markdown-based Skills and Sub-agents is viable when the feature isn't used by 90% of users and is low-maintenance.
actionable: For advanced/power-user features, consider implementing core functionality as prompts/skills in markdown before building heavyweight code infrastructure; use evals to measure feasibility.
source_title: Replacing 12K LoC with a 200 LoC Skill

claim: Agents struggle to stay on track and stay within designated boundaries (e.g., Git worktrees) when relying purely on prompting; compliance is probabilistic rather than enforced.
actionable: When using agents in scoped environments, implement hard constraints at the system level rather than relying on prompts alone; use multiple reinforcement learning training tasks to improve model behavior.
source_title: Replacing 12K LoC with a 200 LoC Skill

claim: Writing evals for agent behavior is straightforward with tools like Braintrust; even first-time eval writers can quickly create scoring functions to detect if models stay on task.
actionable: Use Braintrust or similar eval frameworks to quickly test if models can stay in designated scopes; run multiple evals to identify model-specific failure modes before production.
source_title: Replacing 12K LoC with a 200 LoC Skill

claim: Multi-repo setups (e.g., separate frontend/backend repos) don't work with Git worktrees in older implementations; markdown-based Skills solve this by managing multiple repos automatically.
actionable: For multi-repo projects, use Skills-based orchestration instead of native Git worktree features; let agents manage repo-specific commands directly.
source_title: Replacing 12K LoC with a 200 LoC Skill

claim: Smaller, less capable models (e.g., Haiku) deviate from task scope more often than larger models (Opus, Composer); model choice directly impacts task compliance.
actionable: For scoped agentic tasks, test multiple models and prefer larger/capable models if budget allows; run evals on your specific model before deployment.
source_title: Replacing 12K LoC with a 200 LoC Skill
